title: Raccoon Removal in Ossining, NY | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Ossining, NY. Licensed experts serving Westchester County. Safe, humane removal from attics, chimneys & crawl spaces. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Raccoons in Ossining frequently find their way into attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces of homes near the Hudson River and throughout this historic Westchester village. Best Pest Control NYC provides professional, humane raccoon removal services to protect your property from damage and health risks. Our experienced technicians understand the unique challenges Ossining homeowners face with wildlife intrusion and deliver safe, effective solutions.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Ossining and Westchester County for years with licensed, insured wildlife removal specialists who use humane trapping methods and comprehensive exclusion techniques. We provide complete services including raccoon removal, damage repair, sanitization, and preventative measures to ensure raccoons don't return to your Ossining property.
localContext: Ossining's proximity to the Hudson River, wooded areas around the Croton Aqueduct Trail, and mix of historic homes and modern residences create ideal conditions for raccoon activity. Properties near Cedar Lane Park and throughout the village's tree-lined neighborhoods are particularly susceptible to raccoon intrusions, especially in attics and chimneys of older homes.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Ossining?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Ossining typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring repair, and extent of damage. Our technicians provide free inspections and detailed estimates before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Ossining, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Ossining due to the abundance of wooded areas, proximity to the Hudson River, and ample food sources in residential neighborhoods. They frequently seek shelter in attics, chimneys, and under decks, especially during breeding season from late winter through spring.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Ossining home?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Ossining service calls within 24 hours and can begin the removal process immediately. The complete removal timeline varies from a few days to two weeks depending on whether babies are present and the complexity of the situation, but we work efficiently to resolve your raccoon problem as quickly as possible.

faqs.question: Do you offer raccoon exclusion and prevention services in Ossining?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. After removing raccoons from your Ossining property, we seal all entry points, install chimney caps, secure vents, and reinforce vulnerable areas to prevent future intrusions. We also provide attic cleanup, insulation replacement, and sanitization services to address contamination from raccoon droppings and urine.
